---
title: "Missouri Budget Graph Maker"
---

**Repo:** https://github.com/Lucas-Gates/mo-gov-budget-graph-ui

### Problem
Budget/expenditure data is often published as large spreadsheets that are difficult to explore quickly without writing code or manually filtering.

### The Project
A lightweight desktop GUI (Tkinter) that loads Missouri state expenditure data and lets a user generate charts with a few clicks.

- `control_panel.py` implements a Tkinter control panel UI
- `graph.py` loads a CSV (for example: `2024_State_Expenditures.csv`) and generates Matplotlib bar charts
- `main.py` launches the app

### Key features
- GUI-driven filtering/sorting
- Fast category exploration
- Automatically generates readable bar charts

### Skills demonstrated
- Python desktop UI (Tkinter)
- Data wrangling in pandas
- Visualization in Matplotlib
